hook.summary: Satisfying block placement and line clearing.
hook.visual_action: A hand places colorful blocks into a grid, clearing lines with each move.

scene_flow: Hand places a purple block to complete a horizontal line.
Hand places a green block to complete a vertical line.
Hand places a pink block to complete a vertical line.
Hand places a red block, triggering an 'Amazing' animation.
Hand places a blue block, triggering a 'Great!' animation.
Hand places a yellow block, triggering a 'Good!' animation.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy satisfying, high-score-driven block matching games.
